title: Cracked Moon
description: Resource pack changes the texture of the moon
body:
### What this resource pack does:
**This pack replaces the default moon texture with a cracked version.**
### Why you might want to download it:
**You might want to download it if you’d like to give the moon a cracked look and refresh your game’s visuals.**
### Additional Information:
**Shader used in screenshot: Complementary Reimagined**
